_instructions: Keyword strategy for SEO content, YouTube, and blog posts. Skills read this to understand which topics have search intent, what the primary keywords are, and how to structure content for discovery. Update this as your keyword strategy evolves.

primary_topics.primary_keyword: [EXACT SEARCH PHRASE — e.g. 'content strategy for B2B founders']
primary_topics.notes: [OPTIONAL — e.g. 'low competition, high intent, good for pillar page']

longtail_opportunities: [LONG-TAIL KEYWORD 1 — specific question your audience searches]

competitor_keywords._instructions: Keywords your competitors rank for that you want to target.

avoid_keywords: [KEYWORD TO AVOID 1 — e.g. too broad, too competitive, or off-brand]

high_performing_search_terms: [SEARCH TERM THAT BRINGS VIEWERS TO YOUR CHANNEL 1]
